titleStmt.title: SII 35.75: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 75. (A.R. No. 93 of 1951-52.) RAṬṬIHAḶḶI, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar in the Mukhamaṇḍapa of the Kadaṁbēśvara temple lower portion.

This epigraph doesnot refer to any ruling king. It is dated in the cyclic year Hēmaḷambi, Phālguna Amāvāsya, solar eclipse, Sunday. The details of the date given are irregular. In the cyclic year corresponding to 1237-38 A.D. a solar eclipse occurred only in the month of Mārgaśira, on 1237 A.D. December 19, Saturday; Phālguṇa Amāvāsya occurred on Wednesday, 17th March, 1238 A.D.

The record registers a gift of lands, and house to God Mallināthadēva by mahāpradhāna Karaṇada Kallarasa when Mahādēvadaṇnāyaka was administering Banavāsi-12000. It further records gifts of tolls on merchandise by the Baṇanjigas, Nakharas, Mummuridaṇḍas and the Thousand parivāra including the Sandhivigrahi. The grants were made over to Mūṟujāvidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
da nāvidara ya keṟeya keḷage taṁnuṁbaḷi voḷage kaṁ 40 tu kaḍaṁbēśvara
© svasti śrīmanu mahāpradhānaṁ karaṇada kallarasaru Agniya purada śrī gā
hēmaḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada pālguṇa māsada Amāvāse Ādivāra sū
ryyagrahaṇadaṁdu mūṟujāvidēvara kālaṁ toḷedu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi ko
ṭṭaru mattaru Eraḍu mallināthadēvarige mūṟu huṇiseyiṁ baḍaga
lu gadde girige hōda heddāriyiṁ paḍuvalu mattaru nālku moggana haḷḷadiṁ
daṁ mūḍalu hosageṟeya paḍuvaṇa baḍagaṇa kāṇalu mattaroṁdu kōḍi
vara pagalūṭada keyyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu kaḍaṁbēśvaradēvara sthaḷa ttiya koḷaṁ giri
ge hōda heddāriyiṁ teṁkalu basadiya keyyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu mattaroṁdu mā
girige hōda heddāriyiṁ paḍuvaluṁ brahmapuriya holadiṁda mū
ḍalumā giriya holaniṁdaṁ teṁkalu mattaru Eraḍu kaṁbaṁ nālvattu
mallikārjunadēvara maṭhada mane IppattaOṁdu kayi Ā sthaḷadalu teligara mane Oṁ
du hēṟuvettu mūvattaṁ naṁdādīvige śrīganda Upahārakke śrīmallināthadēvarige
saṁṇa mahadēvadaṁṇāyakaru banavase paṁnitsāsiravaṁnāḷva kāladallu dēvara
śrī kāryyakke maṁ biṭṭu sarvvanamaśyivāyavāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi
koṭṭaru . I sthaḷada hēṟuva baṇaṁjigaru ṭhāṇavāga paṇa Oṁdu koḍuvaru
hēṟiṁge bēḷe bhattada hēṟiṁge vīsa Eleya hēṟige bēḷa Eleya ho
gāṇa gāṇa pratiyiṁ soṭṭigeṁṇe nakhara muṁmuridaṁḍagaḷuṁ
saṁdhivigraha mukhyavāgi sāvira parivāraṁ yī dharmmamaṁ pālisuvaru
riya ghaḷeya mattaru . dānapālanayōrmmadhyēdā
pālanaṁ dānāt svarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 35.75 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
